description: Schema definition for Descriptor in the Beckn Protocol v2.0.1
title: Descriptor

code.description: A machine-readable code identifying the state or type of the entity being described. The valid values for this field are defined by the context in which the Descriptor is used (e.g. DRAFT, ACTIVE, CANCELLED, COMPLETE for a Contract status).

longDesc.example: Powerful gaming laptop with NVIDIA RTX graphics, fast SSD storage, and high-refresh display

shortDesc.example: High-performance gaming laptop with RTX graphics

name.description: Name of the entity being described

thumbnailImage.description: Name of the entity being described

mediaFile.description: Links to multimedia files and images
